title: arachniodes lurida
intro: Arachniodes lurida, also known as the golden spleenwort or golden fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, characterized by its golden-brown scales on the stalks of its leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Arachniodes lurida include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Arachniodes lurida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
